title: New Integration: Zoom!

posts.author: shelly-monday.com (Shelly Gross)
posts.cookedHtml:
Are you working remotely? Need to communicate with your team members/clients? We got you covered with our brand new Zoom integration!

With everything that’s been going around, we wanted to make sure you and your team are connected no matter what. So our AMAZING R&D team added an incredible product update - The Zoom integration!

This integration allows you to gain insights and gather all the information you need from the online meetings you have right into your monday.com account! Now you can make sure you won’t miss a thing and keep working in the smoothest possible way.

You can learn all about it in this great article -
https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360010331019

Stay safe and let us know if you have any questions!
